themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents that can independently perform research tasks, interpret information, and execute actions within research workflows.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that help developers write, debug, review, and understand code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles highlighting specific AI-powered software and platforms designed to assist in various research activities.

themes.name: AI-powered data analysis
themes.description: Content related to AI techniques and tools used for analyzing large datasets, extracting insights, and identifying patterns.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI's ability to condense long texts, research papers, or transcripts into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI for product research
themes.description: Discussions on how AI is applied to understand user needs, market trends, and inform product development decisions.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Articles about AI's role in automating, enhancing, or simulating usability testing processes.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Content exploring how AI is used to gather and analyze data from customers to understand behavior and preferences.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Articles that bridge the gap between AI applications in both the design and research phases of product development.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Content related to AI's impact on job markets, hiring processes, and the skills required in the workforce.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
